appliedUpdates.description: Updated pre-created test data section with fresh audit ID using 185-byte known-good WebM files
Replaced 212-byte invalid mock WebM with 185-byte known-good WebM from mathiasbynens/small (8x8px VP8 keyframe, Chromium-decodable)
Updated test_mock_webm_bytes_length assertion from >= 200 to >= 185 to match new known-good WebM size

notes: Round 3 fixed the root cause: replaced custom-crafted 212-byte WebM (valid EBML structure but invalid VP8 bitstream) with a known-good 185-byte WebM from github.com/mathiasbynens/small. The file is a single-frame 8x8px VP8 keyframe that Chromium's FFmpegDemuxer can decode. All 4 video players now render with controls attribute, no 'Video unavailable' error states.
